summary: Testing iteration 20 - Update mode. Verified dark minimalist design with #E11D48 red accent. All design requirements pass: dark background, sidebar tabs on left for Campaign Dashboard and GM Screen, tab hover effect (red bar on right), tab active effect (full red background), square corners (0px border-radius), and red buttons throughout.

ui_bugs.issue: QuickTips component uses #DC2626 (rgb(220,38,38)) instead of the design system color #E11D48 (rgb(225,29,72)). Minor inconsistency.
ui_bugs.selector: Campaign Tips, GM Screen Tips, World Builder Tips

ui_bugs.issue: Button has purple/violet color instead of red accent. Visible on Campaign Dashboard Setting tab.
ui_bugs.selector: GENERATE IDEAS button in ROOK section
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Change button background from purple to red (#E11D48)
